items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次确认收到美国政府出口管制指令，全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的访问权限。相对此前声明，本次主要是官方对指令执行状态的再确认，并未给出恢复时间线或区域白名单。使用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的服务可能继续不可用。
items.backend_focus: 立即检查生产环境是否仍指向 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 模型 ID，若有依赖需降级到 Claude Opus 4.7、Sonnet 4.x 或 Haiku 等可用版本，并在限流与错误处理中保留对「model unavailable」异常的兼容路径，等待官方解除公告。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布多项公告聚合页，其中包含 Claude Tag（团队协作新方式）、Claude Corps 奖学金、Project Glasswing 扩展及 AI Exponential 政策提案。本条目原文截断，未给出 Claude Tag 的具体产品形态与 API 字段变更。
items.backend_focus: 暂无需行动。Claude Tag 尚未在官方 changelog 给出 SDK/API 字段说明，建议在 Anthropic 公布正式 API 文档与 model/参数变更前保持现有 Claude 模型集成不变。

items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 在美国各社区的受益。这是人才与品牌项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段、SDK 升级或定价变化。对工程系统完全无影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是人才与公益项目，不涉及任何模型、API 或 SDK 变更，工程团队无需任何配置或代码改动。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到 15+ 国家约 150 家新组织，属于安全/政策研究合作计划扩容。这是研究合作项目公告，未涉及 API 新参数、新模型、SDK 版本或区域 endpoint 变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是研究合作扩展公告，不涉及模型版本、API 字段或 SDK 变更，工程团队无需跟进接口或代码改动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级版本，在 coding、agentic 任务与专业工作场景上表现更强。相对 Claude Opus 4.7 是一次能力迭代，API 接入方式、context window、tool use 字段应延续现有 Claude API 兼容范式，旧调用无需立即迁移。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：在现有 Claude API 调用中将 model 字段从 claude-opus-4-7（或更早）改为 claude-opus-4-8，关注 Anthropic 公布的 max_tokens、context window 与新 pricing tier。建议先在 coding/agent 场景灰度切换，对 prompt cache 与 tool use 调用做兼容性回归。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 首尔办公室开业并宣布与韩国 AI 生态新合作，是 APAC 区域市场拓展动作。这是企业区域扩张公告，未直接给出新增 API region、endpoint 或模型可用性变化。现有调用韩国用户的服务暂不需立即调整。
items.backend_focus: 关注 Anthropic 是否在 API status 页面新增首尔/韩国 region 的 inference endpoint。若服务主要面向韩国用户，可在官方开通 region 后将请求路由指向新 endpoint 以降低延迟与跨境带宽成本。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首个 Public Record 结果，是公司透明度与公共记录机制的第一期内容。这是政策/治理信息披露，不涉及任何模型版本、API 字段、SDK 升级或定价/限流变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是政策透明度披露，不涉及模型、API 或 SDK 变更，工程团队无需任何配置或代码改动。
